author: dns-fix-predicate
content: Plan: 1) Apply prior work from feature/implement-dns-error-failure-limit-design-doc-first-git-9a5d (git merge blocked by hooks, applying manually). 2) Extract inline is_dns_error predicate from browser_manager.py into module-level _is_dns_error function. 3) Import real function in test_webdriver_utils.py replacing the local copy. 4) Remove unused CommandExecutionError import. 5) Add NXDOMAIN comment near predicate.
